'''Dalla''' was a rubbery brown [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and an old acquaintance of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Dalla allowed Solo into the [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game in which he won the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] from the [[Drackmarian]] warlord [[Omogg]].<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />

{{Char-stub}}
